query_head:
SELECT m.canonical_hash, m.transport_hash, m.compression, m.uncompressed_size, m.compressed_size
       FROM "sync_batch_object_manifest" m
       JOIN "sync_batch" b
         ON b.id = m.batch_id
        AND b.tenant_id = m.tenant_id

SELECT ro.hash,
            ro.hash_algorithm,
            ro.compression,
            ro.uncompressed_size,
            ro.compressed_size,
            ro.storage_key AS legacy_storage_key,
            l.location_type,
            l.storag

INSERT INTO "remote_object_location"(tenant_id, object_id, batch_id, location_type, storage_key, byte_offset, byte_length)
     VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $6, $4, $7, $5)
     ON CONFLICT (tenant_id, object_id) DO NOTHING

INSERT INTO "tenant_object"(tenant_id, object_id, first_batch_id, ref_count)
     VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4)
     ON CONFLICT (tenant_id, object_id) DO NOTHING
SELECT object_id FROM "tenant_object" WHERE tenant_id = $1 AND object_id = $2 LIMIT $3
SELECT source_kind, project_id, title, started_at, ended_at, turn_count, metadata FROM "projection_session" WHERE tenant_id = $1 AND id = $2 LIMIT $3

INSERT INTO "sync_batch_projection_manifest"(batch_id, tenant_id, entity_type, entity_id)
     VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4)

INSERT INTO "remote_object"(object_id, hash, hash_algorithm, compression, uncompressed_size, compressed_size, storage_key, content_type)
     VALUES ($1, $2, $8, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7)
     ON CONFLICT (object_id) DO NOTHING

SELECT location_type, storage_key, byte_offset, byte_length
       FROM "remote_object_location"
      WHERE tenant_id = $1 AND object_id = $2
      LIMIT $3

SELECT hash, hash_algorithm, compression, uncompressed_size, compressed_size, storage_key
       FROM "remote_object" WHERE object_id = $1 LIMIT $2

INSERT INTO "sync_batch_object_manifest"(
       batch_id, tenant_id, object_id, canonical_hash, transport_hash, compression,
       uncompressed_size, compressed_size, storage_key, content_type
     )
     SELECT $1, $2, input.object_id, i
SELECT role FROM "member" WHERE organization_id = $1 AND user_id = $2 ORDER BY created_at ASC, id ASC
select "id", "user_id", "expires_at", "token", "created_at", "updated_at", "ip_address", "user_agent", "active_organization_id" from "session" where "session"."token" = $1
select "id", "name", "email", "email_verified", "image", "created_at", "updated_at" from "user" where "user"."id" = $1

INSERT INTO "projection_message"(tenant_id, id, session_id, turn_id, role, model, created_at)
     VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7)

INSERT INTO "projection_session"(tenant_id, id, source_kind, project_id, title, started_at, ended_at, turn_count, metadata)
     VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8, $9::jsonb)
SELECT session_id, turn_id, role, model, created_at FROM "projection_message" WHERE tenant_id = $1 AND id = $2 LIMIT $3
SELECT $3 FROM ONLY "public"."projection_session" x WHERE "tenant_id" OPERATOR(pg_catalog.=) $1 AND "id" OPERATOR(pg_catalog.=) $2 FOR KEY SHARE OF x

SELECT object_id, hash, hash_algorithm, compression, uncompressed_size, compressed_size, storage_key
       FROM "remote_object"
       WHERE object_id = ANY($1::text[])

INSERT INTO "tenant_object"(tenant_id, object_id, first_batch_id, ref_count)
     SELECT $1, object_id, $2, $4
       FROM unnest($3::text[]) AS input(object_id)
     ON CONFLICT (tenant_id, object_id) DO NOTHING

INSERT INTO "remote_object"(
       object_id, hash, hash_algorithm, compression, uncompressed_size,
       compressed_size, storage_key, content_type
     )
     SELECT input.object_id, input.hash, input.hash_algorithm, input.compression,

SELECT object_id, canonical_hash, transport_hash, compression, uncompressed_size,
            compressed_size, storage_key, content_type
       FROM "sync_batch_object_manifest"
       WHERE batch_id = $1 AND tenant_id = $2
       ORDER BY

SELECT entity_type, entity_id
       FROM "sync_batch_projection_manifest"
       WHERE batch_id = $1 AND tenant_id = $2
       ORDER BY entity_type, entity_id
commit
begin

select b.oid, b.typarray
      from pg_catalog.pg_type a
      left join pg_catalog.pg_type b on b.oid = a.typelem
      where a.typcategory = $1
      group by b.oid, b.typarray
      order by b.oid

SELECT
       (SELECT count(*)::int FROM "source_file"
         WHERE tenant_id = $1 AND id = ANY($2::text[])) AS source_files,
       (SELECT count(*)::int FROM "raw_record"
         WHERE tenant_id = $1 AND id = ANY($3::text[])) AS raw_re
INSERT INTO "sync_batch"(id, tenant_id, device_id, user_id, store_path, status, object_count) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS session_token_idx ON "session"(token)

INSERT INTO "sync_commit_idempotency"(
       tenant_id, user_id, idempotency_key, request_hash, expires_at
     )
     VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5::timestamptz)
     ON CONFLICT (tenant_id, user_id, idempotency_key) DO NOTHING
     RETURNIN
